channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Germans take over a day off work sick every month—so the government is proposing to cut their pay - Fortune
item.description:
1. Germans take over a day off work sick every month—so the government is proposing to cut their pay  Fortune
  2. Germany already told its workers to ditch four-day weeks and work-life balance. Now the government wants to cut their pay for calling in sick, too  Yahoo
  3. Germany eyes harsher sick leave rules amid absenteeism epidemic, warns 4-day week hurts economy  New York Post
  4. Germans face having wages docked for taking sick days  The Telegraph
  5. Germany plans to deduct salary for first sick day: Here's what it means  Geo News

item.title: Kenyan court jails Chinese man in ant-smuggling case - NBC News
item.description:
1. Kenyan court jails Chinese man in ant-smuggling case  NBC News
  2. Chinese man jailed after trying to smuggle 2,200 ants out of Kenya in his luggage  CNN
  3. Ant smuggler sentenced to a year in jail by Kenyan court  The Guardian
  4. Chinese national sentenced to a year in prison for smuggling ants out of Kenya  BBC
  5. Man Jailed After Trying to Smuggle Thousands of Ants in His Luggage  The Daily Beast

item.title: Ukrainian drone strikes turn major Russian oil refinery into 'volcano' along the Black Sea - The Kyiv Independent
item.description:
1. Ukrainian drone strikes turn major Russian oil refinery into 'volcano' along the Black Sea  The Kyiv Independent
  2. Smoke Plume Rises Above Krasnodar Oil Refinery After Ukraine and Russia Trade Deadly Barrages  The Moscow Times

  4. Drones Hit Tuapse Refinery, Energy Sites in Russia, Officials Say  Kyiv Post
  5. Ukraine Hit Russian Oil Pumping Station Before Ceasefire  Bloomberg.com

item.title: Israeli settlers block Palestinian kids’ path to school with tear gas and barbed wire - AP News

item.title: Hormuz workarounds and arms deals: Gulf states seek to ‘Iran-proof’ their future - The Christian Science Monitor

item.title: China Sharpens Retaliatory Tools Against U.S. Ahead of Trump Summit - WSJ
item.description:

  5. Explainer: China ups legal tools to counter foreign long-arm jurisdiction  Xinhua

item.title: Ukraine Says Russians are Surrendering to Robots - 404 Media
item.description:
1. Ukraine Says Russians are Surrendering to Robots  404 Media
  2. New drones are giving Ukraine a battlefield advantage and ravaging Russia’s oil industry  Fortune

  4. Robots captured Russian army positions for first time in history, Zelenskyy says  politico.eu

item.title: Iran used Chinese spy satellite to target US military bases in Middle East – report - The Times of Israel
item.description:
1. Iran used Chinese spy satellite to target US military bases in Middle East – report  The Times of Israel

item.title: How the Iran War Confirmed, Contradicted, and Complicated U.S. Policy - Council on Foreign Relations
item.description:
1. How the Iran War Confirmed, Contradicted, and Complicated U.S. Policy  Council on Foreign Relations
